entry.title: New: BILL040(25) (Honolulu) — PUBLISH
entry.content:
RELATING TO FEES, CHARGES, AND FINES.

Amends select City fees, charges, and fines in ROH Chapters 1-13. Updates the name and permitted uses of the Highway Beautification and Disposal of Abandoned Vehicles Revolving Fund to conform to State law. Generally effective on January 1, 2026, except amendments related to fees for attendant/ custodian services and camping, which are effective on July 1, 2026.

Latest action: Final reading notice published in the Honolulu Star-Advertiser.

View on the council site
